mechanics.excerpt: On more than one instance in what were surely staged scenes, he popped his cockpit hatch and delivered the klling blow to an opponent's 'Mech with his "Sternsnacht hand cannon As the vids of his matches circulated around the Inner Sphere , people wanted t0 emulate their hero' and demand for bis weapon soared Submachine Guns Smaller than rifle and capable holding more rounds the SMG easily concealable is capable of single-shot and burst fire though less accurate firing the latter. An SMG subject t0 jamming on fumbles the same way as tne auto-pis (above).
